personality_one_liner: A highly readable, trustworthy, and stable financial admin tool that prioritizes clear data hierarchy and functional ease.

spacing.rule: Generous padding around content. Use standard spacing tokens. Avoid dense dashboard-style layouts.

do's: Bottom tab bar when content scrolls behind it
Pinned filter rows or segmented controls

screens.name: Login

states.error: Toast or inline text below input

screens.layout: Hero image at the top (abstract green gradient) with gradient-to-dark scrim. Edge-to-edge section. Inputs in a single column below. Primary CTA sticky at the bottom or below inputs. Forgot Password link below the CTA.

screens.name: Forgot Password
screens.layout: Clean layout. Step indicator at top. Warning text regarding admin approval for new password prominently displayed in 'warning' color block. Single column inputs. Primary CTA.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: High-level overview of schools, students, collections, and pending fees.
screens.layout: Sticky header. 2x2 grid for KPI Cards (Total Schools, Total Students, Total Collected, Total Pending). Cards use `surfaceSecondary`, subtle shadow, icon in a `brandTertiary` circle, large number in Space Grotesk. Below grid, a section for 'Recent Pending Fees' in a horizontal scroll.

screens.name: Schools List

states.empty: Empty state illustration + 'No schools added yet' + Add School button

screens.layout: Search bar at top. Vertical list of School Cards. Each card: leading visual (crest or initials avatar), title, subtitle (total students), trailing chevron. FAB at the bottom right to Add School (`brandPrimary` with glass effect).

screens.name: School Detail
screens.purpose: Deep dive into a specific school's fee status.
screens.layout: Header with school crest and name. Pinned glass segmented tabs: Pending / Completed / Partial. Scrollable vertical list of students beneath. Each student row shows name, status pill, and amount.

screens.name: Students List
screens.purpose: Searchable and filterable directory of all students.
screens.layout: Search bar at top. Horizontal scrollable filter chip row (Pending, Paid, Partial, Standard) pinned below header. Vertical list of Student Rows. Avatar (Initials), Name, Parent Number, Status Pill.

screens.name: Student Detail
screens.purpose: View student info, contact parent, and see payment history.
screens.layout: Profile header. Action row with 'Contact Parent' and 'WhatsApp Reminder' buttons (WhatsApp button uses `success` background). Below is a vertical timeline of Payment History. Timeline entries have a left-aligned circular status badge connected by a subtle vertical line, with amount and date on the right. Sticky primary CTA 'Record Payment' at the bottom.

screens.name: Reports
screens.layout: Form layout. Dropdown for School selection. Date range picker. Two large action buttons: Primary 'Generate PDF' and Secondary 'Export Excel'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 1 iOS-Native Clean personality. Use generous padding and high-contrast typography.
Implement a light and dark theme toggle. Use the provided surface and brand tokens respectively.
For WhatsApp Reminder buttons, use the `success` color for the background with the Ionicons 'logo-whatsapp' icon, and implement `Linking.openURL('https://wa.me/...')` with pre-filled message.
Format all currency figures as INR (₹) using Indian number format (e.g., ₹3,25,000). Use the SpaceGrotesk font for all numeric currency values to ensure tabular readability.
Payment history timelines must feature a vertical spine line and circular status badges (Green Check for Paid, Amber Clock for Partial, Red X for Pending).
Always use gradient scrims (transparent to surfaceInverse) over background images like the auth_hero image.
B2B dashboards require clarity: ensure the KPI cards are highly legible and clearly separated using subtle shadows and clean borders.
Ensure the Record Payment bottom sheet avoids keyboard overlapping by wrapping it properly.
